aic_light.name: AIC Light
aic_light.set_effect: When the wearer defeats an enemy, ATK +20 for 5s.

aic_heavy.name: AIC Heavy
aic_heavy.set_effect: When the wearer defeats an enemy, restore 100 HP. Effect trigger cooldown: 5s.

roving_msgr.name: Roving MSGR
roving_msgr.set_effect: When the wearer's HP is above 80%, Physical DMG +20%.

armored_msgr.name: Armored MSGR
armored_msgr.set_effect: When the wearer's HP is below 50%, the wearer gains 30% DMG Reduction against all types of DMG.

mordvolt_resistant.name: Mordvolt Resistant
mordvolt_resistant.set_effect: When the wearer's HP is below 50%, Treatment Effect +30%.

mordvolt_insulation.name: Mordvolt Insulation
mordvolt_insulation.set_effect: When the wearer's HP is above 80%, Arts DMG +20%.

aburreys_legacy.name: Aburrey's Legacy
aburreys_legacy.set_effect: When the wearer casts a battle skill, combo skill, or ultimate, gain ATK +5% for 15s. The buff from each skill type is unique and does not stack with itself.

catastrophe.name: Catastrophe
catastrophe.set_effect: At the start of battle, the wearer immediately recovers 50 SP.

aethertech.name: Aethertech
aethertech.set_effect: After the wearer applies Vulnerability, the wearer gains Physical DMG +8% for 15s. This effect can reach 4 stacks. If the target already has 4 stacks of Vulnerability, the wearer gains an additional Physical DMG +16% for 10s. This effect cannot stack.

bonekrusha.name: Bonekrusha
bonekrusha.set_effect: When the wearer casts a combo skill, gain 1 stack of Bonekrushing Smash that grants the wearer's next battle skill DMG +30%. Bonekrushing Smash can stack 2 times.

eternal_xiranite.name: Eternal Xiranite
eternal_xiranite.set_effect: When the wearer applies Amp, Protected, Susceptible, or Weakened, other teammates also gain ATK +16% for 15s. This effect cannot stack.

frontiers.name: Frontiers
frontiers.set_effect: After the wearer recovers SP with a skill, the team gains DMG +16% for 15s. This effect cannot stack.

hot_work.name: Hot Work
hot_work.set_effect: After the wearer applies Combustion, Heat DMG +50% for 10s. After the wearer applies Corrosion, Nature DMG +50% for 10s. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.

lynx.name: LYNX
lynx.set_effect: After the wearer gives HP treatment to an allied target, that target also gains 15% DMG Reduction against all types of DMG for 10s. If the treatment exceeds the target's Max HP, the target gains 30% DMG Reduction instead. These effects cannot stack.

mi_security.name: MI Security
mi_security.set_effect: After the wearer scores a critical hit, gain ATK +5% for 5s. This effect can reach 5 stacks. At max stacks, grant an additional Critical Rate +5%. This effect cannot stack.

pulser_labs.name: Pulser Labs
pulser_labs.set_effect: After the wearer applies Electrification, Electric DMG +50% for 10s. After the wearer applies Solidification, Cryo DMG +50% for 10s. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.

swordmancer.name: Swordmancer
swordmancer.set_effect: After the wearer applies a Physical Status, the wearer also performs 1 hit that deals 250% ATK of Physical DMG and 10 Stagger. Effect trigger cooldown: 15s.

tide_surge.name: Tide Surge
tide_surge.set_effect: When the wearer applies 3 stacks of Arts Infliction and triggers an Arts Burst, the Arts Burst deals DMG +100% and reduces the target's matching Elemental Resistance for 10s. This effect cannot stack.

type_50_yinglung.name: Type 50 Yinglung
type_50_yinglung.set_effect: When any operator in the team casts a battle skill, the wearer gains 1 stack of Yinglung's Edge that gives DMG +20% to the wearer's next combo skill. Yinglung's Edge can stack 3 times.
